findings.title: Four overlapping assistant-instruction files duplicate the architecture
findings.evidence: AGENTS.md headings restate CLAUDE.md sections; the 7-agent pipeline, SHA-pin rule, and no-em-dash rule each appear in 3-4 files; no single source of truth.
findings.recommendation: Make CLAUDE.md canonical and reduce the others to short tool-specific pointers.

findings.title: No uv.lock; CLAUDE.md CI-024/uv reference is unbacked
findings.evidence: git ls-files shows no lockfile of any kind; git grep for uv finds only CLAUDE.md:56 referencing a CI-024 freshness check with no uv.lock target.
findings.recommendation: Adopt uv and commit uv.lock, or remove the stale CI-024/uv language from CLAUDE.md.

findings.title: Reusable workflows track floating main, not a release tag
findings.evidence: Three callers pin ByronWilliamsCPA/.github@74c633a # main; Renovate currentValue=main while renovate.json has an unmatched followTag v1 rule.
findings.recommendation: Publish a v1/dated release tag in the org .github repo and repoint the callers to it, aligning with the followTag rule.

findings.title: Renovate does not manage pre-commit hooks
findings.evidence: renovate.json:79-84 enabledManagers omits pre-commit; 6 SHA-pinned hook repos and an embedded renovate@42.92.14 are not auto-updated.
findings.recommendation: Add pre-commit to enabledManagers so security scanners (detect-secrets, trufflehog) and hook pins get update PRs.

findings.title: 22 lint errors hidden in ruff/coverage-excluded scripts
findings.evidence: ruff check on the two extend-excluded files reports 22 errors (21 E501, 1 UP017 at generate_before_samples.py:234); 1 auto-fixable.
findings.recommendation: Run ruff --fix, wrap long lines, and remove the extend-exclude so the lint gate covers all of scripts/.

findings.title: Source PDF downloads have no integrity verification
findings.evidence: CLAUDE.md curl -O of three Oregon PDFs and extract_legal_pdfs.py consume them with no checksum/signature; the RAD #CRITICAL/#VERIFY tag the repo's own convention requires is absent.
findings.recommendation: Record and verify SHA-256 sums for the three PDFs and add the RAD #CRITICAL/#VERIFY tags.

findings.title: In-repo CI gate only checks docs exist; real gate is external
findings.evidence: ci.yml's only job verifies doc files exist; no pytest/ruff/mypy. Enforcement is delegated to an external reusable tracking main.
findings.recommendation: Run pytest+ruff+mypy in ci.yml (suite is 0.14s) or document and tag-pin the merge-blocking external jobs.

findings.title: Committed broken .qlty symlinks leak a local path; gitignore misses them
findings.evidence: git ls-files .qlty/ lists 4 tracked symlinks; file shows broken links to /home/byron/.qlty/cache/...; .gitignore uses trailing-slash patterns that never matched the symlink files (git check-ignore returns nothing).
findings.recommendation: git rm --cached the four symlinks and drop the trailing slash from the .gitignore entries.

findings.title: dict[str, Any] pervades the resolver; the type gate proves little
findings.evidence: basedpyright is typeCheckingMode=standard (not strict) scoped to this file; 28 signatures/locals are dict[str, Any]/list[Any]/Any, so key/type errors are not caught.
findings.recommendation: Model the profile/config sections as TypedDicts or dataclasses and set typeCheckingMode=strict.

findings.title: Coverage measures one of three runtime scripts
findings.evidence: Only test_profile_resolver.py exists; pyproject coverage omits the other two scripts, so their effective coverage is zero (pytest-cov not installed to compute the repo-wide number).
findings.recommendation: Add smoke tests for the two untested scripts and remove them from coverage omit, or document them as intentionally uncovered.

findings.title: Eleven workflows with heavy scanner overlap, most scans disabled
findings.evidence: 7 of 11 workflows are scanners; reusable-workflow-jobs.yaml notes run-codeql/safety/osv/bandit/dependency-review all false, yet standalone codeql.yml and dependency-review.yml duplicate disabled scan types on a zero-dependency repo.
findings.recommendation: Pick one path per scan type and drop scanners with no target on a docs repo, documenting what remains.

findings.title: pyproject declares zero deps; SonarCloud installs unpinned test tools
findings.evidence: pyproject has no dependencies/optional-dependencies/dependency-groups; sonarcloud.yml:51 pip installs pytest>=7.0,<9 and pytest-cov>=4.0,<7 (ranged, not hash-pinned) on a token-bearing runner.
findings.recommendation: Declare pytest/pytest-cov in a [dependency-groups] test group and consider a hash-pinned constraints file for the SonarCloud job.

findings.title: SBOM coverage is thin relative to the dependency surface
findings.evidence: sbom.yml runs anchore/sbom-action over path . with zero declared deps and no lockfile; syft does not catalog Actions or pre-commit pins, so the header comment overstates coverage.
findings.recommendation: Correct the header comment or add explicit cataloging of Actions and pre-commit pins if a true supply-chain SBOM is the goal.

findings.title: tomli fallback import is untyped and unreachable on supported runtimes
findings.evidence: mypy reports import-not-found for tomli at profile_resolver.py:53 and the # type: ignore[no-redef] does not cover it; the fallback targets <3.11 but requires-python is >=3.11.
findings.recommendation: Drop the tomli fallback and its type: ignore since tomllib is always present on the 3.11 floor.

findings.title: no-em-dash documented as a per-profile override but hardcoded repo-wide
findings.evidence: CLAUDE.md frames Tier-3 no-em-dash as configurable and omittable, yet a no-em-dash pre-commit hook (.pre-commit-config.yaml:104-106) and copilot-instructions.md:16 enforce it universally; a profile omitting it would fail CI.
findings.recommendation: Decide whether no-em-dash is universal or per-profile and align the docs with the enforcement.

findings.title: Model Selection table references a superseded model generation
findings.evidence: CLAUDE.md:151-153 names Opus 4.7/Sonnet 4.6/Haiku 4.5 as current; Opus 4.8 is the current top model.
findings.recommendation: Update to the current generation or use role labels instead of version numbers.

findings.title: detect-secrets baseline could not be re-verified locally
findings.evidence: detect-secrets CLI is not installed in the audit environment, so baseline-vs-tree drift was not recomputed; a manual grep found no literal secret values.
findings.recommendation: Confirm in CI that detect-secrets scan --baseline reports no new findings and no orphaned baseline entries.

findings.title: Pre-commit runs no Python lint, type, or test hook
findings.evidence: Hook set is detect-secrets/trufflehog/commitizen/yamllint/markdownlint/renovate-validator/no-em-dash; no ruff, mypy, or pytest hook, and ci.yml does not run them in-repo either.
findings.recommendation: Add ruff and a fast pytest hook to pre-commit to catch Python regressions before push.

findings.title: CHANGELOG [Unreleased] is empty despite post-1.1.0 changes
findings.evidence: CHANGELOG.md:8-10 shows an empty [Unreleased] above [1.1.0] - 2026-05-16, yet CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/README.md changed after that date.
findings.recommendation: Record post-1.1.0 changes under [Unreleased], or drive it with the commitizen hook already configured.

findings.title: Only one ADR exists; major decisions are undocumented
findings.evidence: docs/architecture/ holds only adr-001; the V2 profile resolver, reusable-workflow strategy, and 11-workflow CI design have no ADR.
findings.recommendation: Add short ADRs for the V2 profile architecture and the CI/reusable-workflow strategy.
